category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance for export from China to Angola.

title.en: China-to-Angola Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (INACOM)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入安哥拉：INACOM合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入安哥拉：INACOM合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Angola INACOM mandatory homologação (type approval) under Lei 23/11 (Electronic Communications Law), IANORQ quality and standards requirements, local Angolan importer obligations, electrical safety requirements (220-230 V / 50 Hz, Type C plug), and cybersecurity obligations under Lei 7/17.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与安哥拉INACOM依据第23/11号法律（电子通信法）的强制设备认证（homologação）、IANORQ质量标准要求、当地安哥拉进口商义务、电气安全要求（220-230V/50Hz，C型插头）及第7/17号法律网络安全义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與安哥拉INACOM依據第23/11號法律（電子通訊法）的強制設備認證（homologação）、IANORQ質量標準要求、當地安哥拉進口商義務、電氣安全要求（220-230V/50Hz，C型插頭）及第7/17號法律網路安全義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, INACOM homologação, IANORQ conformity assessment, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current INACOM regulations, IANORQ requirements, Lei 23/11 and Lei 7/17 obligations, import duty rates, and Angolan market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Angola.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、INACOM设备认证（homologação）、IANORQ符合性评估、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于安哥拉销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行INACOM法规、IANORQ要求、第23/11号及第7/17号法律义务、进口税率及安哥拉市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、INACOM設備認證（homologação）、IANORQ符合性評估、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於安哥拉銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行INACOM法規、IANORQ要求、第23/11號及第7/17號法律義務、進口稅率及安哥拉市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: INACOM mandatory homologação (type approval) under Lei 23/11, an authorized Angolan importer or local agent, Portuguese-language documentation, electrical safety compliance (220-230 V / 50 Hz, Type C plug), IANORQ conformity assessment, and cybersecurity obligations under Lei 7/17 are the major Angola compliance gaps compared with Chinese SRRC, MIIT network access licence, CCC, and GB-standard documentation. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognized by INACOM.
answer_first.zh: 相较中国SRRC、工信部网络接入许可、CCC认证及GB标准文件，依据第23/11号法律的INACOM强制设备认证（homologação）、授权安哥拉进口商或当地代理、葡萄牙语文件、电气安全合规（220-230V/50Hz，C型插头）、IANORQ符合性评估及第7/17号法律网络安全义务，是进入安哥拉市场的主要合规差距。INACOM不承认CE、FCC和CCC标志。
answer_first.zht: 相較中國SRRC、工信部網路接入許可、CCC認證及GB標準文件，依據第23/11號法律的INACOM強制設備認證（homologação）、授權安哥拉進口商或當地代理、葡萄牙語文件、電氣安全合規（220-230V/50Hz，C型插頭）、IANORQ符合性評估及第7/17號法律網路安全義務，是進入安哥拉市場的主要合規差距。INACOM不承認CE、FCC和CCC標誌。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
